title: Networking
html:
Networking

Contents

  • Interfaces / addresses
  • Routing / DNS
  • Ports / sockets
  • Diagnose
  • Capture / sniff
  • Firewall (iptables / nft)

Interfaces / addresses

CommandDescription
 
ip addr
(or ip a) — all interfaces + IPs
ip -br addr
brief view
ip link
link layer status
ip link set eth0 up
bring interface up
ip addr add 10.0.0.5/24 dev eth0
add IP
nmcli device status
NetworkManager devices
nmcli con show
saved connections
nmcli con up <name>
activate connection
ifconfig
legacy — net-tools

Routing / DNS

CommandDescription
 
ip route
routing table
ip route add default via 10.0.0.1
add default gateway
ip route get 8.8.8.8
show which route would be used
resolvectl status
systemd-resolved status
cat /etc/resolv.conf
DNS servers in use
dig +short example.com
quick lookup
dig @1.1.1.1 example.com ANY
use specific resolver
host example.com
simpler dig
nslookup example.com
older but ubiquitous

Ports / sockets

CommandDescription
 
ss -tlnp
listening TCP ports + PIDs
ss -tunap
all TCP+UDP, numeric, with PIDs
ss -s
summary counts
netstat -tlnp
legacy net-tools equivalent
lsof -i :443
processes on port 443
fuser -v 80/tcp
what is using TCP/80

Diagnose

CommandDescription
 
ping -c 4 8.8.8.8
4 echo requests
traceroute example.com
hop trace
mtr example.com
interactive traceroute + loss/latency
nc -zv host 22 443 8080
TCP port reachability
curl -v https://example.com
verbose HTTP request
curl -I https://example.com
headers only
wget --mirror https://site
recursive download

Capture / sniff

CommandDescription
 
tcpdump -i eth0 -nn port 80
live capture HTTP, no name lookups
tcpdump -i any -w out.pcap
write to file (open in Wireshark)
tcpdump -r out.pcap
read pcap
tshark -i eth0 -Y http.request
Wireshark CLI with display filter

Firewall (iptables / nft)

CommandDescription
 
iptables -L -v -n --line-numbers
list current rules
iptables -A INPUT -p tcp --dport 22 -j ACCEPT
open SSH
iptables -P OUTPUT DROP
default-deny outbound
iptables-save > rules.v4
persist (debian: iptables-persistent)
nft list ruleset
nftables current ruleset
ufw status verbose
Ubuntu firewall front-end
